scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r src/web dist/web
scripts.build:test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && cp -r src/web dist-test/src/web
scripts.test: sh -c 'files=$(find dist-test/tests -name "*.test.js" ! -name "*codex-brain-integration*"); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No compiled tests found in dist-test/."; exit 1; fi; node --test $files'
scripts.test:ci: sh -c 'files=$(find dist-test/tests -name "*.test.js" ! -name "*codex-brain-integration*"); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No compiled tests found in dist-test/."; exit 1; fi; node --test $files'
scripts.test:integration: sh -c 'files=$(find dist-test/tests -name "*codex-brain-integration*.test.js"); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No compiled integration tests found in dist-test/."; exit 1; fi; RUN_CODEX_INTEGRATION=1 node --test $files'
